items.headline: Yield from rent.
items.body: MUTAV yield comes from rental fees and Brazilian treasury. When crypto corrects, your position holds. Magic.

items.headline: Legal structure.
items.body: MUTAV built the infrastructure that opens this market. The full operation runs within a regulated framework.

items.headline: On-chain for the 1st time.
items.body: Tokenized Brazil's rental market. Three token classes. Any qualified investor. Self-custodial. The vehicle that didn't exist until now.
